data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. BEAU BANDIT was excellent in a strong Provincial Championships qualifier at Gosford, finishing a close fourth and hitting the line like a horse ready to win at short notice. He is peaking third up, and both of his career wins have been on this track. Hard to beat for ours. 6. FUADEE resumed from a 12-week break with a sharp BM64 win at Hawkesbury 16 days ago, and he has only missed the frame once in his career. He is nicely placed with a 3kg claim, and in a field that is not any tougher, he should run another bold race. 3. HOPPER did not fire at Wyong on soft ground, which may have brought him undone. His prior Kembla win over 1400m was strong, and he is worth another chance. 2. THE GREAT HOUDINI won first-up in town last prep and he must be respected fresh up.","runners":[4,6,3,2],"exclusive":true}
